question: Will CPI rise more than 0.9% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has already been released today (April 10, 2026). The official BLS report shows CPI increased only 0.3% in March, which is significantly below the 0.9% threshold required for YES resolution. This market should resolve to NO with certainty.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows March CPI increased 0.3%
Market closes tomorrow but data already released
No possibility of revision large enough to change outcome
risks: Minor data revisions possible but extremely unlikely to change outcome by 0.6+ percentage points
